name: OpenBox AI
oneliner: Enterprise AI trust platform providing Identity Security Posture Management, Agent Lifecycle Management, and a real-time Agent Access Gateway.
finserv: Selected for Accenture FinTech Innovation Lab London 2026. Founded by ex-Microsoft and ex-BlackRock executives. Backed by Tykhe Ventures.
team: Tahir Mahmood (CEO, ex-Microsoft), Asim Ahmad (COO/CRO, ex-BlackRock).
thesis: OpenBox's cognitive behavior analysis and dynamic agent risk scoring catch emergent failure modes that static governance cannot. The Accenture FinTech Lab placement accelerates its finserv pipeline.
